zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Brome III於1310年出生在英國爾斯托雷頓時，他的父親Robert de Brome I30歲，母親Parnell de Stourton23歲。他於1330年與Hawise Halways在英國越可爾希費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1386年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Brome III于1310年出生在英国爾斯托雷頓时，他的父亲Robert de Brome I30岁，母亲Parnell de Stourton23岁。他于1330年与Hawise Halways在英国越可爾希費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1386年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Brome III was born in 1310, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, his father, Robert de Brome I, was 30 and his mother, Parnell de Stourton, was 23. He married Hawise Halways in 1330, in Highfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1386, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Brome III est né en 1310, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Brome I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Parnell de Stourton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Halways en 1330, à Highfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1386, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Brome III 1310 in Storeton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Brome I 30 und seine Mutter Parnell de Stourton 23. Er hat 1330 in Highfield, Yorkshire, England Hawise Halways geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1386 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Brome III è nato il nel 1310 nel Storeton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Brome I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Parnell de Stourton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Hawise Halways nel 1330, nel Highfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1386, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Brome IIIが1310年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Brome Iは30歳，母Parnell de Stourtonは23歳であった。1330年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒグhフィールドでHawise Halwaysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1386年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Brome III(이)가 1310년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Brome I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Parnell de Stourton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1330년 영국 요르크실르 히그h필드에서 Hawise Halways(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Brome III nasceu em 1310, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Brome I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Parnell de Stourton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Halways em 1330, em Highfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1386, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Brome III родился в 1310 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Brome I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Parnell de Stourton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Halways в 1330 г. в местности хаифиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1386 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Brome III nació en 1310, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Brome I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Parnell de Stourton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Hawise Halways en 1330, en Highfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1386, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
